ルディア、セレストの調子はどうだ？<br>あいつのことだから色々と心配でだなぁ…: Ludia, how's Celeste doing? Knowing her, I can't help worrying.
スタイル良くて人気はあるんだけど、まぁ色々と問題がね……:
She's got a great figure and is popular, but well, there are
problems...
無断欠勤じゃないだろうな……？: She hasn't been skipping work without notice, has she?
あ～、それは大丈夫。<br>だってあの子、個室で寝泊まりしちゃってるんだもの。: Ah, that's fine. She's practically living in her room here, after all.
あれ、司令官じゃん。: Oh, if it isn't the Commander.
たまにだるいけど、警備の仕事よりは楽かもね。夜から始まるし。:
It's a drag sometimes, but it's easier than guard duty. Plus it starts
at night.
ってか、やば……ニ日酔いで頭痛いな……: Actually, crap... I've got a hangover and my head hurts...
お水飲んで顔洗ってらっしゃい。<br>もうすぐセレストさんご指名のお客様が来るん:
Drink some water and wash your face. You've got a client coming soon
who specifically requested you.
はぁ……だるいな。今日は楽して私、マグロになってようかな……:
*sigh*... What a drag. Maybe I'll just take it easy and be a dead fish
today...
あのなぁ。二日酔いは大目に見るが、<br>客に満足してもらえるようにサービスだけ:
Hey now. I'll let the hangover slide, but you've got to at least put in
the effort to keep the clients happy.
そこなのよねぇ～。セレストさんの一番の問題は。<br>いい？ 手抜きはだめよ？:
That's exactly the problem, you know? Celeste's biggest issue. Listen,
no cutting corners, okay? Clients can tell right away.
ルディアの言っていた通り、セレストを指名した客が娼館にやってきた。:
Just as Ludia said, a client who had requested Celeste arrived at the
brothel.
